settings.subtitle: Modern, mobile, and unmistakably current. Your scent moves at the pace of the city — sharp, polished, never out of place.

settings.content: Skyline at dusk. Clean white shirts. The first sip of something cold and clear. You are already at the next thing.
A signature that holds in a boardroom, a rooftop, a 6 a.m. flight. Built for now, designed to travel.

settings.label: Read more
settings.content: The Cosmopolitan favours fragrance with edges: citrus that cuts clean, white florals tightened with metallic notes, a base that feels architectural rather than warm. Modern, mineral, decisive. The kind of scent that doesn't ask for permission — it assumes the room.

settings.title: The | Cosmopolitan's | companions
settings.subtitle: Notes that move with you — clean, sharp, current.

settings.title: Share your scent archetype with your friends!
settings.body: Let your circle find their olfactory match — the discovery is more interesting when it's compared.
